{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032112161563237775B94FB4193F06\"}"},"total":78},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7457160073305572120","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者肯定是个老手。不像其它的，新手写的很流畅，故事也跌宕起伏相对。比番茄的其它新手写手来说，那简直就有很大的差距，说真的，书荒的可以值得一看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736260677,"group_id":"7448959961314364441","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"女，17岁，我叫林梦汐","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N188ghCk/kjTXnlGiIPDyZ4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776619584\u0026x-signature=COIg0Cf24es9cyIKjPOtpxTq078%3D","user_id":"685710708312536","user_name":"希望每个人天天开心"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"685710708312536","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7448959961314364441","book_info":{"abstract":"离开孤儿院的罗利，刚刚开始自己的写作之旅，却在一个雷雨夜穿越到自己刚刚设定好大纲的小说之中，不幸的是睁眼居然来到了卡巴内的世界，幸运的是……这是一本同穿小说，他可以和其他世界的自己交流共享。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7f8c5f5a6ce6e66d00e914639c000291~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"沉默不是银","author_id":"","book_id":"7448959961314364441","book_name":"同时穿越一百零一个世界","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2776人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":718,\"name\":\"动漫衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718\u0026name=动漫衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=
